steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Auren Energia 2024-03-31
from decimal import Decimal
# Given data (ÚLTIMO = latest 2024-03-31, previous year annual values from 2023: annual)
# Balance sheet latest
Ativo = 27694357000.0
Disponibilidades = 3094615000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 5347929000.0
# Debt components latest
Empr_cur = 865022000.0
Empr_long = 5673472000.0
Div_Bruta = Empr_cur + Empr_long
# Equity
Patrimonio = 12223465000.0
# Quarterly and annual P&L
# Q1 2024 (ÚLTIMO quarter)
rec_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
# Q1 2023 (PENULTIMO quarter)
rec_q1_2023 = 1414510000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 313784000.0
net_q1_2023 = 229952000.0
# Annual 2023 (previous annual)
rec_2023 = 6181890000.0
ebit_2023 = 1073914000.0
net_2023 = -317689000.0
# Depreciation entries
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
dep_q1_2023 = -159460000.0
dep_2023 = -641809000.0
# Other values
Ativo_total = Ativo
Passivo_Circulante = 3183325000.0
Fornecedores = 410719000.0
# Shares and price
shares = 1000000000
price = 12.35
# Compute LTM (12 months rolling)
rec_ltm = rec_2023 + rec_q1_2024 - rec_q1_2023
ebit_ltm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ltm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
# Debt and net debt
div_bruta = Div_Bruta
div_liquida = div_bruta - Disponibilidades
# Market caps and EV
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - Disponibilidades
# EBITDA LTM = EBIT LTM + depreciation LTM (use absolute)
dep_ltm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
# dep_ltm negative (as reported); EBITDA = EBIT - dep_ltm? since dep entries negative
# dep_ltm is negative number e.g. -640597000 -> depreciation magnitude = 640597000
depr_mag = -dep_ltm
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + depr_mag
# Ratios
p_over_l = None
lpa = net_ltm / shares
if lpa != 0:
    p_over_l = price / lpa
else:
    p_over_l = float('nan')
vpa = Patrimonio / shares
p_over_vp = price / vpa
p_over_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
psr = market_cap / rec_ltm if rec_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
p_over_ativos = price / (Ativo_total / shares)
p_over_cap_giro = market_cap / (Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante)
# For P/Ativ Circ Liq, assume price / (Ativo Circulante - Disponibilidades) per share
p_over_ativ_circ_liq = price / ((Ativo_Circulante - Disponibilidades)/shares)
ev_over_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
ev_over_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
# Margins (use LTM)
res_bruto_2023 = 1332944000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 291026000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 331844000.0
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2023 + res_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023
marg_bruta = res_bruto_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_liquida = net_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
ebit_over_ativo = ebit_ltm / Ativo_total * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic = ebit_ltm / (Ativo_total - Fornecedores - Disponibilidades) * 100
roe = net_ltm / Patrimonio * 100
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante
div_br_over_patrim = div_bruta / Patrimonio * 100
giro_ativos = rec_ltm / Ativo_total * 100
# Prepare outputs rounded as requested
from math import isfinite
def rnd(x,dec=2):
    if x is None or (isinstance(x,float) and not isfinite(x)):
        return None
    return round(x,dec)

results = {
    'Ativo': rnd(Ativo,2),
    'Disponibilidades': rnd(Disponibilidades,2),
    'Ativo Circulante': rnd(Ativo_Circulante,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': rnd(div_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': rnd(div_liquida,2),
    'Patrim. L3q': None # placeholder
}
# Print key computed values
print('rec_ltm', rec_ltm)
print('ebit_ltm', ebit_ltm)
print('net_ltm', net_ltm)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('div_bruta', div_bruta)
print('div_liquida', div_liquida)
print('ev', ev)
print('ebitda_ltm', ebitda_ltm)
print('p/l', p_over_l)
print('p/vp', p_over_vp)
print('p/ebit', p_over_ebit)
print('psr', psr)
print('p/ativos', p_over_ativos)
print('p/cap_giro', p_over_cap_giro)
print('p/ativ_circ_liq', p_over_ativ_circ_liq)
print('ev/ebitda', ev_over_ebitda)
print('ev/ebit', ev_over_ebit)
print('lpa', lpa)
print('vpa', vpa)
print('marg_bruta%', marg_bruta)
print('marg_ebit%', marg_ebit)
print('marg_liq%', marg_liquida)
print('ebit/ativo%', ebit_over_ativo)
print('roic%', roic)
print('roe%', roe)
print('liquidez_corr', liquidez_corr)
print('div_br/patrim%', div_br_over_patrim)
print('giro_ativos%', giro_ativos)

# Build final dict for all required indicators
indicators = {
    'Ativo': Ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': Disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': Ativo_Circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liquida,
    'Patrim. L�f3q': Patrimonio,
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': rec_ltm,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ltm,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': net_ltm,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rec_q1_2024,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q1_2024,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': net_q1_2024,
    'P/L': p_over_l,
    'P/VP': p_over_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_over_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_over_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_over_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_over_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_over_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_over_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_over_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': div_br_over_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print as python repr
import json
print(json.dumps(indicators, indent=2))

# Return results for assistant
indicators
"} }

{"inp":{"code":"# Re-run calculations avoiding problematic unicode in keys
from math import isfinite
# Data
Ativo = 27694357000.0
Disponibilidades = 3094615000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 5347929000.0
Empr_cur = 865022000.0
Empr_long = 5673472000.0
div_bruta = Empr_cur + Empr_long
Patrimonio = 12223465000.0
rec_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
rec_q1_2023 = 1414510000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 313784000.0
net_q1_2023 = 229952000.0
rec_2023 = 6181890000.0
ebit_2023 = 1073914000.0
net_2023 = -317689000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
dep_q1_2023 = -159460000.0
dep_2023 = -641809000.0
Passivo_Circulante = 3183325000.0
Fornecedores = 410719000.0
shares = 1000000000
price = 12.35

# LTM
rec_ltm = rec_2023 + rec_q1_2024 - rec_q1_2023
ebit_ltm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ltm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
# Depreciation LTM
dep_ltm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
depr_mag = -dep_ltm
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + depr_mag

# Debt and EV
div_liquida = div_bruta - Disponibilidades
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - Disponibilidades

# Ratios
lpa = net_ltm / shares
vpa = Patrimonio / shares
p_over_l = price / lpa if lpa !=0 else float('nan')
p_over_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else float('nan')
p_over_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
psr = market_cap / rec_ltm if rec_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
p_over_ativos = price / (Ativo / shares)
p_over_cap_giro = market_cap / (Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante) if (Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante)!=0 else float('nan')
# P/Ativ Circ Liq assume price / (Ativo Circulante - Disponibilidades) per share
p_over_ativ_circ_liq = price / ((Ativo_Circulante - Disponibilidades)/shares)

ev_over_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else float('nan')
ev_over_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else float('nan')

# Margins LTM
res_bruto_2023 = 1332944000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 291026000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 331844000.0
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2023 + res_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023
marg_bruta = res_bruto_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_liquida = net_ltm / rec_ltm * 100

ebit_over_ativo = ebit_ltm / Ativo * 100
roic = ebit_ltm / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Disponibilidades) * 100
roe = net_ltm / Patrimonio * 100
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante
div_br_over_patrim = div_bruta / Patrimonio * 100
giro_ativos = rec_ltm / Ativo * 100

# Rounding helper
def rr(x,dec=2):
    if x is None:
        return None
    try:
        if not isfinite(x):
            return None
    except Exception:
        pass
    return round(x,dec)

# Prepare final mapping with names exactly matching requested enum entries
output = [
    ("Ativo", rr(Ativo,2)),
    ("Disponibilidades", rr(Disponibilidades,2)),
    ("Ativo Circulante", rr(Ativo_Circulante,2)),
    ("Dív. Bruta", rr(div_bruta,2)),
    ("Dív. Líquida", rr(div_liquida,2)),
    ("Patrim. Lq", None),
]
# We'll not use the broken key; instead add Patrim. Laat properly later
# Build dict properly
results = {
    'Ativo': rr(Ativo,2),
    'Disponibilidades': rr(Disponibilidades,2),
    'Ativo Circulante': rr(Ativo_Circulante,2),
    'Dív. Bruta': rr(div_bruta,2),
    'Dív. Líquida': rr(div_liquida,2),
    'Patrim. Lq': rr(Patrimonio,2),
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': rr(rec_ltm,2),
    'EBIT (12 meses)': rr(ebit_ltm,2),
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': rr(net_ltm,2),
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': rr(rec_q1_2024,2),
    'EBIT (3 meses)': rr(ebit_q1_2024,2),
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': rr(net_q1_2024,2),
    'P/L': rr(p_over_l,2) if p_over_l is not None else None,
    'P/VP': rr(p_over_vp,2),
    'P/EBIT': rr(p_over_ebit,2) if isfinite(p_over_ebit) else None,
    'PSR': rr(psr,2),
    'P/Ativos': rr(p_over_ativos,4),
    'P/Cap. Giro': rr(p_over_cap_giro,3),
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': rr(p_over_ativ_circ_liq,3),
    'EV / EBITDA': rr(ev_over_ebitda,2),
    'EV / EBIT': rr(ev_over_ebit,2),
    'LPA': rr(lpa,6),
    'VPA': rr(vpa,6),
    'Marg. Bruta': rr(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT': rr(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. L�edquida': rr(marg_liquida,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo': rr(ebit_over_ativo,2),
    'ROIC': rr(roic,2),
    'ROE': rr(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': rr(liquidez_corr,3),
    'Div Br/ Patrim': rr(div_br_over_patrim,2),
    'Giro Ativos': rr(giro_ativos,2)
}

print(results)

# Also print some explanatory values for verification
print('\nVerification values:')
print('market_cap', market_cap)
print('ev', ev)
print('ebitda_ltm', ebitda_ltm)
print('dep_ltm', dep_ltm)

results
"}}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute numeric values without special-character strings
Ativo = 27694357000.0
Disponibilidades = 3094615000.0
Ativo_Circulante = 5347929000.0
Empr_cur = 865022000.0
Empr_long = 5673472000.0
div_bruta = Empr_cur + Empr_long
Patrimonio = 12223465000.0
rec_q1_2024 = 1397531000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 499841000.0
net_q1_2024 = 253618000.0
rec_q1_2023 = 1414510000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 313784000.0
net_q1_2023 = 229952000.0
rec_2023 = 6181890000.0
ebit_2023 = 1073914000.0
net_2023 = -317689000.0
dep_q1_2024 = -158248000.0
dep_q1_2023 = -159460000.0
dep_2023 = -641809000.0
Passivo_Circulante = 3183325000.0
Fornecedores = 410719000.0
shares = 1000000000
price = 12.35

# LTM
rec_ltm = rec_2023 + rec_q1_2024 - rec_q1_2023
ebit_ltm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
net_ltm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
# Depreciation LTM
dep_ltm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
depr_mag = -dep_ltm
ebitda_ltm = ebit_ltm + depr_mag

# Debt and EV
div_liquida = div_bruta - Disponibilidades
market_cap = price * shares
ev = market_cap + div_bruta - Disponibilidades

# Ratios
lpa = net_ltm / shares
vpa = Patrimonio / shares
p_over_l = price / lpa if lpa !=0 else None
p_over_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_over_ebit = market_cap / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / rec_ltm if rec_ltm!=0 else None
p_over_ativos = price / (Ativo / shares)
p_over_cap_giro = market_cap / (Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante) if (Ativo_Circulante - Passivo_Circulante)!=0 else None
# P/Ativ Circ Liq assume price / (Ativo Circulante - Disponibilidades) per share
p_over_ativ_circ_liq = price / ((Ativo_Circulante - Disponibilidades)/shares)

ev_over_ebitda = ev / ebitda_ltm if ebitda_ltm!=0 else None
ev_over_ebit = ev / ebit_ltm if ebit_ltm!=0 else None

# Margins LTM
res_bruto_2023 = 1332944000.0
res_bruto_q1_2024 = 291026000.0
res_bruto_q1_2023 = 331844000.0
res_bruto_ltm = res_bruto_2023 + res_bruto_q1_2024 - res_bruto_q1_2023
marg_bruta = res_bruto_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_ltm / rec_ltm * 100
marg_liquida = net_ltm / rec_ltm * 100

ebit_over_ativo = ebit_ltm / Ativo * 100
roic = ebit_ltm / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Disponibilidades) * 100
roe = net_ltm / Patrimonio * 100
liquidez_corr = Ativo_Circulante / Passivo_Circulante
div_br_over_patrim = div_bruta / Patrimonio * 100
giro_ativos = rec_ltm / Ativo * 100

# Print simple numeric results
print('\n'.join([f'rec_ltm={rec_ltm}', f'ebit_ltm={ebit_ltm}', f'net_ltm={net_ltm}', f'dep_ltm={dep_ltm}', f'ebitda_ltm={ebitda_ltm}', f'market_cap={market_cap}', f'ev={ev}', f'div_bruta={div_bruta}', f'div_liquida={div_liquida}', f'lpa={lpa}', f'vpa={vpa}', f'p_over_l={p_over_l}', f'p_over_vp={p_over_vp}', f'p_over_ebit={p_over_ebit}', f'psr={psr}', f'p_over_ativos={p_over_ativos}', f'p_over_cap_giro={p_over_cap_giro}', f'p_over_ativ_circ_liq={p_over_ativ_circ_liq}', f'ev_over_ebitda={ev_over_ebitda}', f'ev_over_ebit={ev_over_ebit}', f'marg_bruta={marg_bruta}', f'marg_ebit={marg_ebit}', f'marg_liquida={marg_liquida}', f'ebit_over_ativo={ebit_over_ativo}', f'roic={roic}', f'roe={roe}', f'liquidez_corr={liquidez_corr}', f'div_br_over_patrim={div_br_over_patrim}', f'giro_ativos={giro_ativos}']))

# Also output as tuple list for assistant to use
output_values = (
    Ativo, Disponibilidades, Ativo_Circulante, div_bruta, div_liquida, Patrimonio,
    rec_ltm, ebit_ltm, net_ltm, rec_q1_2024, ebit_q1_2024, net_q1_2024,
    p_over_l, p_over_vp, p_over_ebit, psr, p_over_ativos, p_over_cap_giro, p_over_ativ_circ_liq,
    ev_over_ebitda, ev_over_ebit, lpa, vpa, marg_bruta, marg_ebit, marg_liquida, ebit_over_ativo, roic, roe, liquidez_corr, div_br_over_patrim, giro_ativos
)
print('\nOUTPUT_TUPLE_START')
print(output_values)
print('OUTPUT_TUPLE_END')

output_values
"}}
